data.content: Plan review rejected. The proposed Bun/TypeScript selector is not distribution-safe for Foolery's installed setup flow: scripts/install.sh downloads setup.sh as a standalone temporary file, scripts/build-runtime-artifact.sh does not bundle scripts/, and the runtime bundle installs production dependencies only, so a sibling scripts/select-models.ts plus dev-only Inquirer packages would not be available. The plan also regresses the existing 'Other (type manually)' path for large model lists and places __tests__/select-models.test.ts outside Vitest's src/**/__tests__/**/*.test.ts include. Revise the plan to use an implementation that works for both standalone setup.sh and local agent-wizard.sh, preserves manual model entry, and extends the existing Vitest/PTy smoke coverage.
